text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although neither Satono Diamond nor Kitasan
Black take first, the audience is thrilled by their
fierce battle.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen and Tokai Teio are among those
watching from the stands.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond and Kitasan Black both bite
back their disappointment, feeling they can't let
things finish as they are.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black proposes a rematch at the spring
Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After some discussion, Satono Diamond and I
decide that she'll also enter the spring Tenno Sho.
